ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( Property_Type__c = 'Design' ,Amount_Expected_to_collect__c < Amount_Collected__c, IF(Property_Type__c = 'Construction', Amount_Expected_to_Collect_for_Commisson__c < Amount_Collected_for_Commission__c , false) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Amount Collected should not be greater than the Amount Expected to collect.
